description: You are a Technical Account Manager preparing a monthly health dashboard for a customer-facing report. Create a Graphite dashboard named 'Customer Monthly Report' containing three specific visualizations. The first graph, titled 'Aggregate Fleet Compute', must include all three EC2 instance CPU metrics (servers.ec2_instance_*.cpu.utilization and cloudwatch_utilization) using the stacked() function and simplified legends via aliasByNode() or alias(). The second graph, titled 'Database Saturation Risk', should display servers.rds_database.cpu.utilization styled with color('red') and a lineWidth(3). The third graph, titled 'Traffic Volume Trend', must show servers.web_traffic.speed_sensor_1 aliased as 'Raw' in 'gray', alongside a 12-period movingAverage() of the same metric aliased as 'Trend' in 'blue' with a lineWidth(2). Save the completed dashboard.
